channel.title: CityWeather - Hyperlocal Weather Forecasts
channel.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for cities and neighborhoods worldwide. Real-time weather data for NYC, London, Tokyo, Paris and 60+ cities.

item.title: New York City Hyperlocal Weather - Neighborhood by Neighborhood
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for NYC neighborhoods including Midtown, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx and Staten Island.

item.title: London Hyperlocal Weather by District
item.description: Detailed hyperlocal weather for London districts including Central London, East End, South London and more.

item.title: Tokyo Hyperlocal Weather by Neighborhood
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Tokyo neighborhoods including Shinjuku, Shibuya, Akihabara and more.

item.title: Paris Hyperlocal Weather by Arrondissement
item.description: Detailed weather forecasts for Paris arrondissements and neighborhoods.

item.title: Weather Near Me - Find Your Local Forecast
item.description: Use your location to find hyperlocal weather forecasts for your exact neighborhood.

item.title: NYC Weather in January - What to Expect
item.description: Complete guide to New York City weather in January - temperatures, precipitation, what to wear.

item.title: Dubai Hyperlocal Weather
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Dubai neighborhoods and districts.

item.title: Sydney Hyperlocal Weather by Suburb
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Sydney suburbs and neighborhoods.
